question: In what year was Magna Carta sealed by King John of England?
reference_answer: Magna Carta was sealed by King John at Runnymede in 1215 [S1].

must_support.claim: King John of England sealed Magna Carta in 1215.
must_support.supporting_quote: Under pressure from rebellious barons, King John of England agreed to the terms of Magna Carta and affixed his seal to it at Runnymede in 1215.

must_not_assert: Magna Carta was signed by King Henry II.
